This is a technical blog from humble developer Maxime Buffa, focused on backend and devops topics, with a pinch of hobbyist game development-related mentions. It provides some (hopefully relevant) information, guides and short tips about Elixir/OTP, Kubernetes, Git, Postgres (or SQL in general) and features a few demos.
It also features a series of articles about setting up your own server, deploying exciting and "cutting edge" technologies on your own bare metal (Kube, ArgoCD, Gitea...). It's not always Shakespeare, but it's authentic.

Also features a hiring page in case someone would need a CTO or a Software Architect to build fast and reliable software.
